jira_task.summary: UI Content Update In Footer Section
jira_task.description:
Update the text in the footer section to personalize the branding. Specifically, replace the existing text "Add us on social media?" with "Raj chavda".
What to Change
Target Text: Replace the string "Add us on social media?" with "Raj chavda".
Acceptance Criteria
[ ] The text "Add us on social media?" is successfully removed.
[ ] The text "Raj chavda" is correctly rendered in its place.
[ ] The update does not cause any layout distortion or text overflow in the footer or designated section.
[ ] The styling (font, size, alignment) of "Raj chavda" matches the original design requirements.

technical_spec.title: UI Content Update In Footer Section
technical_spec.overview: Update the text in the footer section by replacing 'Add us on social media?' with 'Raj chavda'. Ensure no layout issues and maintain original design requirements.
acceptance_criteria: The text 'Add us on social media?' is successfully removed.
The text 'Raj chavda' is correctly rendered in its place.
The update does not cause any layout distortion or text overflow in the footer or designated section.

technical_spec.rollout_notes: The changes in FooterLinks.js, NewFooter.js, Footer.js, and FooterLinksData.js will be verified to ensure no layout issues and that the text 'Raj chavda' is correctly rendered.

test_cases.title: Verify text removal and replacement in footer links component
preconditions: FooterLinks.js contains 'Add us on social media?'
steps: Open the application and navigate to a page with a footer.
Check that the text 'Add us on social media?' is present in the FooterLinks component.
Run the test case and replace all occurrences of 'Add us on social media?' with 'Raj chavda' in the specified files.
Verify that the text 'Add us on social media?' has been removed from the footer links.
Verify that the text 'Raj chavda' is correctly rendered in its place.
test_cases.expected: The text 'Add us on social media?' is successfully removed and replaced with 'Raj chavda'. No layout issues or overflow occur, and the styling matches the original design requirements.

test_cases.title: Verify no layout distortion in footer after update
preconditions: FooterLinks.js contains 'Add us on social media?' and the application has a responsive design
steps: Open the application and navigate to a page with a responsive footer.
Check that the text 'Add us on social media?' is present in the Footer component.
Run the test case and replace all occurrences of 'Add us on social media?' with 'Raj chavda' in the specified files.
Verify that no layout distortion or overflow occurs after the update.
test_cases.expected: No layout distortion or overflow occurs in the footer after updating the text. The styling matches the original design requirements.

test_cases.title: Verify correct font, size, and alignment of new text 'Raj chavda'
preconditions: FooterLinks.js contains 'Add us on social media?' and the application has a consistent design
steps: Open the application and navigate to a page with a footer.
Check that the text 'Add us on social media?' is present in the Footer component.
Run the test case and replace all occurrences of 'Add us on social media?' with 'Raj chavda' in the specified files.
Verify that the font, size, and alignment of the new text 'Raj chavda' match the original design requirements.
test_cases.expected: The font, size, and alignment of the new text 'Raj chavda' match the original design requirements after the update.
